data.title: 国际服关于联合作战的介绍
data.summary: [Allied Operation Guide] Complete battles via Allied Operations to deal damage to the boss's Total H
data.body:
[Allied Operation Guide]

Complete battles via Allied Operations to deal damage to the boss's Total HP. Defeat the boss to earn amazing rewards!
